title: antidesma jongkindii
intro: Antidesma jongkindii, also known as Jongkind's antidesma, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Antidesma jongkindii include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used as a component in various polyherbal remedies.
